system.subtitle: 企业商业版图与供应链递归探索系统

implemented_scope: scripts/fetch_official_source_full_text.py reads the official NVIDIA anchor registry and committed dry-run text fixture.
The connector validates source URL agreement, capture status, minimum text length and 100% expected-token coverage before writing any database rows.
Dry-run raw_source_snapshots preserve source text, token list, parser version, record_mode=dry_run, source_health, retry_policy, attempts, live_retrieval=false and release_clearance=false.
Dry-run source_documents use a distinct external_id suffix and raw_storage_uri under tests/fixtures/official_source_full_text/.
Dry-run entity_resolution_candidates are stored under parser_version nvidia-official-fulltext-dry-run-v1 and keep confidence, matched research/entity IDs, match method and review status.
Dry-run ingestion_evidence_chain rows are context-only, carry source_health and retry_policy in structured_fact, and explicitly mark dry_run_context_only_not_published_relationship.

The integration test runs the connector twice to prove idempotent upsert behavior and asserts 4 raw snapshots, 4 evidence rows, 53 resolution candidates, healthy source coverage and zero relationship_fact_candidates for the dry-run parser.
validation_commands: GitHub Actions make verify-g2-db must prove the dry-run connector inside PostgreSQL integration because this host has no local Docker/PostgreSQL.
remaining_gaps_before_done: This is a dry-run fixture connector only; live official-source retrieval is still required before A202 can be closed.
The committed fixture is a parser contract, not a reproduction of official full text and not legal or market clearance.
A production owner-supplied decision or a second independent-source closure path is still required before Golden Vertical facts can be release-approved.
A206 remains open until source health, retry and dead-letter behavior are proven in the 4h/24h operator soak path.
rollback: Remove scripts/fetch_official_source_full_text.py and the official_source_full_text fixture directory.
Remove the dry-run invocation and assertions from tests/integration/test_database_migrations.py.
Remove the dry-run evidence paths from scripts/validate_v5_production_readiness_sync.py, acceptance_traceability.csv and development_status_ledger.csv.
Rerun make verify and GitHub Actions make verify-g2-db.
